description: city and county seat of Cook County, and largest city in State of Illinois, United States of America
description_wiki: Chicago is the most populous city in the U.S. state of Illinois and in the Midwestern United States.

description: high school in Illinois, United States
description_wiki: Lane Tech College Prep High School (often shortened to Lane Tech, full name Albert Grannis Lane Technical College Preparatory High School), is a public four-year selective enrollment magnet high school located in the Roscoe Village neighborhood on the north side of Chicago, Illinois, United States.

aliases: Ground forces of the United States Armed Forces
description: land service branch of the United States Armed Forces
description_wiki: The United States Army (U.S. Army) is the land service branch of the United States Armed Forces.

description: major north-south thoroughfare in Chicago, Illinois, United States
description_wiki: Clark Street is a north–south street in Chicago, Illinois, that runs close to the shore of Lake Michigan from the northern city boundary with Evanston, to 2200 South in the city street numbering system.

description: United States Army post in Kentucky, United States
description_wiki: Fort Knox is a United States Army installation in Kentucky, south of Louisville and north of Elizabethtown.

description: Wikimedia disambiguation page
description_wiki: Fort McCoy may refer to:

description: 1939–1945 global conflict
description_wiki: World War II, or the Second World War (1 September 1939 – 2 September 1945), was a global conflict between two coalitions: the Allies and the Axis powers.

aliases: War to Resist US Aggression and Aid Korea
description: war between North and South Korea, 1950–1953
description_wiki: The Korean War (25 June 1950 – 27 July 1953) was an armed conflict the Korean Peninsula fought between North Korea (Democratic People's Republic of Korea; DPRK) and South Korea (Republic of Korea; ROK) and their allies.

description: designated city in Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan
description_wiki: Yokohama (Japanese: 横浜; pronounced [jokohama] ) is the second-largest city in Japan by population as well as by area, and the country's most populous municipality.

description: Marginal sea in the Pacific Ocean
description_wiki: The Yellow Sea (simplified Chinese: 黄海; traditional Chinese: 黃海; pinyin: Huáng Hǎi; Zhuyin Fuhao: ㄏㄨㄤˊ ㄏㄞˇ; Korean: 황해; Hanja: 黃海; RR: Hwanghae), also known as the North Sea, is a marginal sea of the Western Pacific Ocean located between mainland China and the Korean Peninsula, and can be considered the northwestern part of the East China Sea.

description: city in Seoul Capital Area, South Korea
description_wiki: Incheon is a city located in northwestern South Korea, bordering Seoul and Gyeonggi Province to the east.

surface_forms: Inchon, that was the beachhead several months before
description: 1950 amphibious invasion during the Korean War in Incheon resulting in a victory and strategic reversal in favor of the UN Command
description_wiki: The Battle of Inchon (Korean: 인천 상륙 작전; Hanja: 仁川上陸作戰; RR: Incheon Sangnyuk Jakjeon), also called Inchon landing, was an amphibious invasion and a battle of the Korean War that resulted in a decisive victory and strategic reversal in favor of the United Nations Command (UN).

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Texas (  TEK-səss) is the most populous state in the Southern United States.

description: 1941-1996 combat formation of the United States Army
description_wiki: The 24th Infantry Division was an infantry division of the United States Army that was deactivated in October 1996.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Hawaii (  hə-WY-ee; Hawaiian: Hawaiʻi [həˈvɐjʔi, həˈwɐjʔi]) is an island state of the United States, in the Pacific Ocean about 2,000 miles (3,200 km) southwest of the U.S. mainland.

description: Sovereign state in East Asia
description_wiki: North Korea, officially the Democratic People's Republic of Korea (DPRK), is a country in East Asia.

description: city in Gyeonggi Province, South Korea
description_wiki: Uijeongbu (Korean: 의정부; Korean pronunciation: [ɰi.dʑʌŋ.bu]) is a city in Gyeonggi Province, South Korea.

description: circle of latitude
1942 medium tank family
description_wiki: The M4 Sherman, officially Medium Tank, M4, was the medium tank most widely used by the United States and Western Allies in World War II. The M4 Sherman was reliable and well adapted to mass production.

description: type of medium tank
description_wiki: The M46 Patton is an American medium tank designed to replace the M26 Pershing and M4 Sherman.

description: metropolitan city of South Korea
description_wiki: Busan (Korean: 부산; pronounced [pusan]), officially Busan Metropolitan City, is the second most populous city in South Korea, after Seoul; it has a population of over 3.3 million as of 2024.

description: capital and largest city of Japan
description_wiki: Tokyo, officially the Tokyo Metropolis, is the capital and most populous city of Japan.

description: main residence of the Emperor of Japan
description_wiki: The Imperial Palace (皇居, Kōkyo; lit. 'Imperial Residence') is the main residence of the emperor of Japan.

description: American entertainer (1903–2003)
description_wiki: Lester Townes "Bob" Hope (né Leslie Townes Hope; May 29, 1903 – July 27, 2003) was a British-born American comedian, actor, entertainer and producer with a career that spanned nearly 80 years and achievements in vaudeville, network radio, television, and USO Tours.

description: volcano in Yamanashi and Shizuoka Prefectures, Japan
description_wiki: Mount Fuji (富士山・富士の山, Fujisan, Fuji no Yama) is an active stratovolcano located on the Japanese island of Honshu, with a summit elevation of 3,776.24 m (12,389 ft 3 in).

description: Wikimedia disambiguation page
description_wiki:
The Far East Command was a military regional division of the British military, the United States military, and the Soviet Armed Forces

British Far East Command
Far East Command (United States), a United States military command (1947–57)
Far East Command (Soviet Union), a command created in 1945 specifically for the Soviet invasion of Manchuria.

description: country located primarily in North America
description_wiki: The United States of America (USA), also known as the United States (U.S.) or America, is a country primarily located in North America.
